Section: The Prophet is neither soothsayer nor mad; they call him a poet—both sides wait the outcome

Section: Rhetorical refutations: bring a discourse like it; did they create themselves or the cosmos; do they own treasures, ladders, unseen, or a god besides Allah?

Section: Be patient—you are under Our gaze; glorify your Lord standing, by night, and when the stars set
